violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Observed duct tape holding seal on large chest freezer.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Observed damaged seals on both chest freezers.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed inside of toaster ovens need to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed doors and sides of appliances need to be cleaned.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Observed cracked floor tiles in food prep area.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Observed seal on chest freezer in back was damaged.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed inside of toaster ovens need to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed outside of toaster ovens need to be cleaned.
Toilet facilities. — ---Toilet room used by women did not contain at least one covered waste receptacle.---Toilet room was not provided with a self closing door.
